TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == New Delhi / Sin-te-li "pabelin aca Niw-te-li, In-ti a kamu, ŗ§®ŗ§ą ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Ä, Ing-a kamuNew Delhi" nu In-tu a angangan, In-tu lin-pang cen-bu a kitizaan, nu In-tu tabakiay a kitizaan Te-li a kitizaan. tini i In-tu satipan saamisan, muenengi Hen-he a saciliw a sa'wac nu Ya-mu-na-he satip a tukus, sawali saamis malalitin yu malumanay a Te-li "Sa-cya-han-na-pa-te". nilaculan hamin nu Te-li a kanatal angangan a sakuwan u hekal 1,482 telek kungli, 1,637 emang ku tademaw "2011 a mihcaan", u Sin-teli a tademaw 1,337 ema ng. 2013 a m ihca 4 a bulad "kitakit a tukay migingkiw tuyni a kitizaan" "Demographia World Urban Areas" pahapiw tu saka 9 lekad musakamu tu nikinsaan, kitakit a tukay duduc tu pasisil kakatuud nu tademaw tu saka 4, pakala tu 2,282 emang ku tademaw. Sin-te nu hamin kanatalay a cen-ce, keyza atu lalangawan angangan. Sin-te-li u mahiniay u paedilay a tukay, tukay Mu-la-s a putah mala angangan, tukay a zazan masabu-se, masakakatu ku calayan suda pasayza i iwliwan. tabakiay a nipatizengan hatu masanan i angangan nu tukuay. cen-bu angangan a sakaput sanad sa i tukay a kitizaan makay Cong-tung-bu katukah In-tu a laed katukuh pina a kung-li nu ahebalay tusa a lilis nu tabakiay a zazan. pitatengilan nu kanatal tungduh a luma' masamuluay a nipatizeng, liwliw u salengacay talakaway a ba'tu, masamulu ku cukel, hisasi atu tukung acukel nitu'tu'an nu In-tu a wayway. Cong-tung-bu a badahung u tabakiay pankiw a mali a nisanga'an, iza ku nu Mung-u-al hung-tiay a wayway. tukay nu satipanay a Kang-naw-te a iciba micidek ku nisangaan, imulu masasala, nu Sin-te-li tabakiay a angangan nu pisiwbayan. Sin-te-li nu hiyaaytu hamin u saculilan a angangan, izaw ku 5 kanatalay a zazan, 6 ku zazan nu silamalay matatulin tu, mipatizeng aca tu tusa a pahikukian. Sin-te-li kining nu ba'tuay a paya ni Cyw-ce lima se i 1911 a muhcaan Te-li-se-al-pa a mihcaan tanektekay. nu Ing-kow a nipatizeng a sayhu ci Ay-te-wen.Lu-cin-s-cye-s atu He-pow-te.Pey-ke-cye-s ku misekeay. Sin-te-li Ii1931 a mihcaa 2 a bulad 13 a dimiad u In-tu-cowng-tu ci Ay-wen-sin-cye ku mibuhatay. Cya-al-ke-ta i Ing-kow nu pidebinga u angangan tu nu In-tu, katukuh 1911 a mihca 12 a bulad. Cya-al-ke-ta makay 19 se-ci tu sazikuzay mala In-tu tekeday unukay a angangan. uyni a unukay malilid ku tabakiay apaculi tu cen-ce, pasu i Cya-al-ke-ta mipatay tu mikawaway i cen-bu nu In-kow. binawlanan mibslih tu nizateng nu Ing sakay Ing-kow a tuud mahamin amatena', uyni midebungan mapacici nu cen-bu muliyaw papulung tu Mung-cya-la-kwa, satu In-tu a a ngangan pilimad han patayza i Si-te-li. Si-te-li na i kasumamadana a In-tu, Te-li-su-tan-kow atu Mung-u-al hungti a kanatal 1649 a mihcaan katukuh 1857 a mihcaan atu angangan nu gingtu. 1900 a ziday, Ing-kow patahkal cacay siyang uyni a angangan pabulaen patayza i In-tu, a nakamuan, makay In-tu tukus a bayu nu Cya-al-ke-ta mabulaw tayza i Te-n-li. hicasa ku Ing mikuwanan tu In-tu saamisa a teban nu Te-n-li mikuwan tu In-tu i pizateng madayum. duduc tu 1894 a mihcaan "hulic a pipacakay tu lala'" makal tu sapatizeng tu Si-te-li a lala'.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == n…ôw d…ôr~…ĺńßi / sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi "pab…ôr~…ĺin a ¶a niw-t…ô-r~…ĺi, in-ti a kamu, ** ******, iŇč-a kamun…ôw d…ôr~…ĺńßi" nu in-tu a aŇčaŇčan, in-tu r~…ĺin-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a kitizaan, nu in-tu tabakiaj a kitizaan t…ô-r~…ĺi a kitizaan. tini i in-tu satipan saamisan, mu…ôn…ôŇči ńß…ôn-ńß…ô a sa ¶ir~…ĺiw a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu ja-mu-na-ńß…ô satip a tukus, sawar~…ĺi saamis mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin ju mar~…ĺumanaj a t…ô-r~…ĺi "sa- ¶ja-ńßan-na-pa-t…ô". nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ńßamin nu t…ô-r~…ĺi a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan a sakuwan u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ *,*** t…ôr~…ĺ…ôk kuŇčr~…ĺi, *,*** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw "**** a mińß ¶aan", u sin-t…ôr~…ĺi a tad…ômaw *,*** …ôma Ňč. **** a m ińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad "kitakit a tukaj migiŇčkiw tujni a kitizaan" "d…ômograpńßia worr~…ĺd urban ar…ôas" pańßapiw tu saka * r~…ĺ…ôkad musakamu tu nikinsaan, kitakit a tukaj dudu ¶ tu pasisir~…ĺ kakatuud nu tad…ômaw tu saka *, pakar~…ĺa tu *,*** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. sin-t…ô nu ńßamin kanatar~…ĺaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôza atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan aŇčaŇčan. sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi u mańßiniaj u pa…ôdir~…ĺaj a tukaj, tukaj mu-r~…ĺa-s a putańß mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan, tukaj a zazan masabu-s…ô, masakakatu ku ¶ar~…ĺajan suda pasajza i iwr~…ĺiwan. tabakiaj a nipatiz…ôŇčan ńßatu masanan i aŇčaŇčan nu tukuaj. ¶…ôn-bu aŇčaŇčan a sakaput sanad sa i tukaj a kitizaan makaj ¶oŇč-tuŇč-bu katukańß in-tu a r~…ĺa…ôd katukuńß pina a kuŇč-r~…ĺi nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj tusa a r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu tabakiaj a zazan. pitat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ tuŇčduńß a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° masamur~…ĺuaj a nipatiz…ôŇč, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj tar~…ĺakawaj a ba Ē~ °tu, masamur~…ĺu ku ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ, ńßisasi atu tukuŇč a ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an nu in-tu a wajwaj. ¶oŇč-tuŇč-bu a badańßuŇč u tabakiaj pankiw a mar~…ĺi a nisaŇča Ē~ °an, iza ku nu muŇč-u-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇč-tiaj a wajwaj. tukaj nu satipanaj a kaŇč-naw-t…ô a i ¶iba mi ¶id…ôk ku nisaŇčaan, imur~…ĺu masasar~…ĺa, nu sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi tabakiaj a aŇčaŇčan nu pisiwbajan. sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu ńßijaajtu ńßamin u sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a aŇčaŇčan, izaw ku * kanatar~…ĺaj a zazan, * ku zazan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj matatur~…ĺin tu, mipatiz…ôŇč a ¶a tu tusa a pańßikukian. sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi kiniŇč nu ba Ē~ °tuaj a paja ni ¶jw- ¶…ô r~…ĺima s…ô i **** a muńß ¶aan t…ô-r~…ĺi-s…ô-ar~…ĺ-pa a mińß ¶aan tan…ôkt…ôkaj. nu iŇč-kow a nipatiz…ôŇč a sajńßu ¶i aj-t…ô-w…ôn.r~…ĺu- ¶in-s- ¶j…ô-s atu ńß…ô-pow-t…ô.p…ô-k…ô- ¶j…ô-s ku mis…ôk…ôaj. sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi ii**** a mińß ¶aa * a bur~…ĺad ** a dimiad u in-tu- ¶owŇč-tu ¶i aj-w…ôn-sin- ¶j…ô ku mibuńßataj. ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta i iŇč-kow nu pid…ôbiŇča u aŇčaŇčan tu nu in-tu, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad. ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta makaj ** s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj mar~…ĺa in-tu t…ôk…ôdaj unukaj a aŇčaŇčan. ujni a unukaj mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku tabakiaj apa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, pasu i ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta mipataj tu mikawawaj i ¶…ôn-bu nu in-kow. binawr~…ĺanan mibsr~…ĺińß tu nizat…ôŇč nu iŇč sakaj iŇč-kow a tuud mańßamin amat…ôna Ē~ °, ujni mid…ôbuŇčan mapa ¶i ¶i nu ¶…ôn-bu mur~…ĺijaw papur~…ĺuŇč tu muŇč- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa, satu in-tu a a ŇčaŇčan pir~…ĺimad ńßan patajza i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi. si-t…ô-r~…ĺi na i kasumamadana a in-tu, t…ô-r~…ĺi-su-tan-kow atu muŇč-u-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu aŇčaŇčan nu giŇčtu. **** a zidaj, iŇč-kow patańßkar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj sijaŇč ujni a aŇčaŇčan pabur~…ĺa…ôn patajza i in-tu, a nakamuan, makaj in-tu tukus a baju nu ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta mabur~…ĺaw tajza i t…ô-n-r~…ĺi. ńßi ¶asa ku iŇč mikuwanan tu in-tu saamisa a t…ôban nu t…ô-n-r~…ĺi mikuwan tu in-tu i pizat…ôŇč madajum. dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan "ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a pipa ¶akaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °" makar~…ĺ tu sapatiz…ôŇč tu si-t…ô-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == New Delhi / Sin-te-li "pabelin aca Niw-te-li, In-ti a kamu, ŗ§®ŗ§ą ŗ§¶ŗ§Ņŗ§≤ŗ•ćŗ§≤ŗ•Ä, Ing-a kamuNew Delhi" nu In-tu a angangan, In-tu lin-pang cen-bu a kitizaan, nu In-tu tabakiay a kitizaan Te-li a kitizaan. tini i In-tu satipan saamisan, muenengi Hen-he a saciliw a sa'wac nu Ya-mu-na-he satip a tukus, sawali saamis malalitin yu malumanay a Te-li "Sa-cya-han-na-pa-te". nilaculan hamin nu Te-li a kanatal angangan a sakuwan u hekal 1,482 telek kungli, 1,637 emang ku tademaw "2011 a mihcaan", u Sin-teli a tademaw 1,337 ema ng. 2013 a m ihca 4 a bulad "kitakit a tukay migingkiw tuyni a kitizaan" "Demographia World Urban Areas" pahapiw tu saka 9 lekad musakamu tu nikinsaan, kitakit a tukay duduc tu pasisil kakatuud nu tademaw tu saka 4, pakala tu 2,282 emang ku tademaw. Sin-te nu hamin kanatalay a cen-ce, keyza atu lalangawan angangan. Sin-te-li u mahiniay u paedilay a tukay, tukay Mu-la-s a putah mala angangan, tukay a zazan masabu-se, masakakatu ku calayan suda pasayza i iwliwan. tabakiay a nipatizengan hatu masanan i angangan nu tukuay. cen-bu angangan a sakaput sanad sa i tukay a kitizaan makay Cong-tung-bu katukah In-tu a laed katukuh pina a kung-li nu ahebalay tusa a lilis nu tabakiay a zazan. pitatengilan nu kanatal tungduh a luma' masamuluay a nipatizeng, liwliw u salengacay talakaway a ba'tu, masamulu ku cukel, hisasi atu tukung acukel nitu'tu'an nu In-tu a wayway. Cong-tung-bu a badahung u tabakiay pankiw a mali a nisanga'an, iza ku nu Mung-u-al hung-tiay a wayway. tukay nu satipanay a Kang-naw-te a iciba micidek ku nisangaan, imulu masasala, nu Sin-te-li tabakiay a angangan nu pisiwbayan. Sin-te-li nu hiyaaytu hamin u saculilan a angangan, izaw ku 5 kanatalay a zazan, 6 ku zazan nu silamalay matatulin tu, mipatizeng aca tu tusa a pahikukian. Sin-te-li kining nu ba'tuay a paya ni Cyw-ce lima se i 1911 a muhcaan Te-li-se-al-pa a mihcaan tanektekay. nu Ing-kow a nipatizeng a sayhu ci Ay-te-wen.Lu-cin-s-cye-s atu He-pow-te.Pey-ke-cye-s ku misekeay. Sin-te-li Ii1931 a mihcaa 2 a bulad 13 a dimiad u In-tu-cowng-tu ci Ay-wen-sin-cye ku mibuhatay. Cya-al-ke-ta i Ing-kow nu pidebinga u angangan tu nu In-tu, katukuh 1911 a mihca 12 a bulad. Cya-al-ke-ta makay 19 se-ci tu sazikuzay mala In-tu tekeday unukay a angangan. uyni a unukay malilid ku tabakiay apaculi tu cen-ce, pasu i Cya-al-ke-ta mipatay tu mikawaway i cen-bu nu In-kow. binawlanan mibslih tu nizateng nu Ing sakay Ing-kow a tuud mahamin amatena', uyni midebungan mapacici nu cen-bu muliyaw papulung tu Mung-cya-la-kwa, satu In-tu a a ngangan pilimad han patayza i Si-te-li. Si-te-li na i kasumamadana a In-tu, Te-li-su-tan-kow atu Mung-u-al hungti a kanatal 1649 a mihcaan katukuh 1857 a mihcaan atu angangan nu gingtu. 1900 a ziday, Ing-kow patahkal cacay siyang uyni a angangan pabulaen patayza i In-tu, a nakamuan, makay In-tu tukus a bayu nu Cya-al-ke-ta mabulaw tayza i Te-n-li. hicasa ku Ing mikuwanan tu In-tu saamisa a teban nu Te-n-li mikuwan tu In-tu i pizateng madayum. duduc tu 1894 a mihcaan "hulic a pipacakay tu lala'" makal tu sapatizeng tu Si-te-li a lala'.

kitizaan, nu in-tu tabakiaj a kitizaan t…ô-r~…ĺi a kitizaan. tini i in-tu satipan saamisan, mu…ôn…ôŇči ńß…ôn-ńß…ô a sa ¶ir~…ĺiw a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ nu ja-mu-na-ńß…ô satip a tukus, sawar~…ĺi saamis r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan aŇčaŇčan. sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi u mańßiniaj u pa…ôdir~…ĺaj a tukaj, tukaj mu-r~…ĺa-s a putańß mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan, tukaj a zazan masabu-s…ô, masakakatu ku ¶ar~…ĺajan suda pasajza i iwr~…ĺiwan. tabakiaj a nipatiz…ôŇčan ńßatu masanan i aŇčaŇčan nu tukuaj. ¶…ôn-bu aŇčaŇčan a sakaput sanad sa i tukaj a kitizaan makaj ¶oŇč-tuŇč-bu katukańß in-tu a r~…ĺa…ôd katukuńß pina a kuŇč-r~…ĺi nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj tusa a r~…ĺir~…ĺis nu tabakiaj a zazan. pitat…ôŇčir~…ĺan nu kanatar~…ĺ tuŇčduńß a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° masamur~…ĺuaj a nipatiz…ôŇč, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw u sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj tar~…ĺakawaj a ba Ē~ °tu, masamur~…ĺu ku ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ, ńßisasi atu tukuŇč a ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ nitu Ē~ °tu Ē~ °an nu in-tu a wajwaj. ¶oŇč-tuŇč-bu a badańßuŇč u tabakiaj pankiw a mar~…ĺi a nisaŇča Ē~ °an, iza ku nu muŇč-u-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇč-tiaj a wajwaj. tukaj nu satipanaj a kaŇč-naw-t…ô a i ¶iba mi ¶id…ôk ku nisaŇčaan, imur~…ĺu masasar~…ĺa, nu sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi tabakiaj a aŇčaŇčan nu pisiwbajan. sin-t…ô-r~…ĺi nu ńßijaajtu ńßamin u sa ** a bur~…ĺad. ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta makaj ** s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj mar~…ĺa in-tu t…ôk…ôdaj unukaj a aŇčaŇčan. ujni a unukaj mar~…ĺir~…ĺid ku tabakiaj apa ¶ur~…ĺi tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, pasu i ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta muŇč- ¶ja-r~…ĺa-kwa, satu in-tu a a ŇčaŇčan pir~…ĺimad ńßan patajza i si-t…ô-r~…ĺi. si-t…ô-r~…ĺi na i kasumamadana a in-tu, t…ô-r~…ĺi-su-tan-kow atu muŇč-u-ar~…ĺ ńßuŇčti a kanatar~…ĺ **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan atu aŇčaŇčan nu giŇčtu. **** a zidaj, iŇč-kow patańßkar~…ĺ ¶a ¶aj sijaŇč ujni a aŇčaŇčan pabur~…ĺa…ôn patajza i in-tu, a nakamuan, makaj in-tu tukus a baju nu ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-ta mabur~…ĺaw tajza i t…ô-n-r~…ĺi. ńßi ¶asa ku iŇč mikuwanan tu in-tu saamisa a t…ôban nu t…ô-n-r~…ĺi mikuwan tu in-tu i pizat…ôŇč madajum. dudu ¶ tu **** a mińß ¶aan "ńßur~…ĺi ¶ a pipa ¶akaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °" makar~…ĺ tu sapatiz…ôŇč tu si-t…ô-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °.
